answer.name: The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc.

hints.description: This financial services institution offers a wide range of banking, asset management, and insurance products to individuals, businesses, and institutions. They provide services like retail banking, commercial lending, wealth management, and investment banking. Notably, they are one of the largest banks in the United States and have a significant presence in the Mid-Atlantic region, led by CEO ***** ***.
hints.funFact1: The company's origins trace back to 1845 with the founding of the *** *** Trust Company in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, making it one of the oldest continuously operating banks in the nation.
hints.funFact2: In 2008, during the height of the financial crisis, ***** acquired National City Corporation, significantly expanding its footprint and becoming the fifth-largest U.S. bank at the time, a bold move orchestrated by then-CEO ***** ***.
